tasks.label: run:ollama-pipeline
tasks.command: $env:OPENAI_PROVIDER='ollama'; $env:OPENAI_API_KEY='ollama'; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL='http://localhost:11434/v1'; $env:OPENAI_MODEL='llama3.2'; $env:AGENT_MODEL_CONFIG_FILE='${workspaceFolder}\shared\agent-models.json'; python ${workspaceFolder}/main.py --req "API local para biblioteca comunitaria con catalogo, prestamos y devoluciones" --provider ollama --lang espanol

tasks.label: run:service-mode:library
tasks.command: $env:OPENAI_PROVIDER='ollama'; $env:OPENAI_API_KEY='ollama'; $env:OPENAI_BASE_URL='http://localhost:11434/v1'; $env:OPENAI_MODEL='llama3.2'; $env:AGENT_MODEL_CONFIG_FILE='${workspaceFolder}\shared\agent-models.json'; python ${workspaceFolder}/main.py --service-mode --req 'API local para biblioteca comunitaria con catalogo, prestamos y devoluciones' --provider ollama --lang espanol

tasks.label: run:service-mode:env-requirement
tasks.command: $env:CKRAFTE_SERVICE_MODE='1'; if (-not $env:DEFAULT_REQUIREMENT) { $env:DEFAULT_REQUIREMENT='API local para biblioteca comunitaria con catalogo, prestamos y devoluciones' }; python ${workspaceFolder}/main.py --provider ollama --lang espanol

tasks.label: maintenance:publish-open-source-update
tasks.command: powershell -NoLogo -NoProfile -Command "git add -A; git commit -m 'docs: open-source community and security hardening'; git push origin main"
